_meta.description: Quarter-end CUMULATIVE health premium by insurer and carrier type from the GI Council Segment-wise Report's June / September / December editions. One row per period × entity × carrier_group, where period is the cumulative label the workbook template uses: Q1FYxx = up to June (3 months), H1FYxx = up to September (6 months), 9MFYxx = up to December (9 months). Values are the report's printed year-to-date figures — never annualised, never delta-derived. Each edition also restates the same period of the prior year (its Previous Year rows); the newest GIC statement of a period wins. Missing is never zero.
_meta.notes: Filled by scripts/ingest/ingest-gicouncil-segment-annual.ts from quarter-end files in data/raw/gicouncil/segment/<YYYY-06|09|12>.xlsx (live-fetched, agent-pulled, or manually dropped). Feeds the FY26 GWP tab's H1/9M cumulative input columns; the FY columns come from gic-health-portfolio.json.
